---
package: "openpipeline_spatial"
version: "v0.5.0"
title: "from_xenium_to_spatialexperiment"
namespace: "Convert"
description: "Creates a SpatialExperiment object from the downloaded unzipped Xenium Output Bundle directory for 10x Genomics Xenium spatial gene expression data, and saves it as a SpatialExperiment object."
type: "module"
toc: false
latest: "true"
subtitle: "openpipeline_spatial v0.5.0"
---

::: {.column-margin}

### Info

ID: `from_xenium_to_spatialexperiment`  
Namespace: `convert`

### Links

[{{< fa brands github >}} View source code](https://github.com/openpipelines-bio/openpipeline_spatial/tree/v0.5.0/src/convert/from_xenium_to_spatialexperiment)

[![](/images/viash-hub-logo.svg){.vh-icon} Browse all versions](https://www.viash-hub.com/packages/openpipeline_spatial)

[![](/images/viash-hub-logo.svg){.vh-icon} Get run instructions](https://www.viash-hub.com/packages/openpipeline_spatial/v0.5.0/components/convert/from_xenium_to_spatialexperiment)

:::

The constructor assumes the downloaded unzipped Xenium Output Bundle has the following structure:

Mandatory files
· | — cell_feature_matrix.h5
· | — cells.parquet
Optional files, by default added to the metadata() as a list of paths (will be converted to parquet):
· | — transcripts.parquet
· | — cell_boundaries.parquet
· | — nucleus_boundaries.parquet
· | — experiment.xenium



## Argument group

### Arguments

|Name                                |Description                                                                                                                                                           |Attributes                                                                                                                            |
|:----------|:--------------------------------------------------|:--------------------|
|`--input`                           |Input Xenium Output Bundle                                                                                                                                            |`file`, required, example: `"path/to/xenium_bundle"`                                                                                  |
|`--add_experiment_xenium`           |Whether to add xenium.experiment parameters to the metadata.                                                                                                          |`boolean`, default: `TRUE`                                                                                                            |
|`--add_parquet_paths`               |Whether to add parquet paths to the metadata.  If True, `transcripts.parquet`, `cell_boundaries.parquet`, `nucleus_boundaries.parquet` will be added to the metadata. |`boolean`, default: `TRUE`                                                                                                            |
|`--alternative_experiment_features` |Feature names containing these strings will be moved to altExps(sxe) slots as separate SpatialExperiment objects.                                                     |List of `string`, default: `"NegControlProbe", "UnassignedCodeword", "NegControlCodeword", "antisense", "BLANK"`, multiple_sep: `";"` |
|`--output`                          |Output SpatialExperiment file                                                                                                                                         |`file`, required, example: `"output.rds"`                                                                                             |

## Authors


  * Dorien Roosen [{{< fa brands github >}}](https://github.com/dorien-er) [{{< fa brands linkedin >}}](https://linkedin.com/in/dorien-roosen) (author, maintainer)

## Example commands

You can run the pipeline using `nextflow run`.

### View help

You can use `--help` as a parameter to get an overview of the possible parameters.

```bash
nextflow run openpipelines-bio/openpipeline_spatial \
  -r v0.5.0 -latest \
  -main-script target/nextflow/convert/from_xenium_to_spatialexperiment/main.nf \
  --help
```

### Run command

<details>
<summary>Example of `params.yaml`</summary>

Generate a `params.yaml` for this component on [Viash Hub](https://www.viash-hub.com/packages/openpipeline_spatial/v0.5.0/components/convert/from_xenium_to_spatialexperiment).

</details>

Run locally with:

```bash
nextflow run openpipelines-bio/openpipeline_spatial \
  -r v0.5.0 -latest \
  -profile docker \
  -main-script target/nextflow/convert/from_xenium_to_spatialexperiment/main.nf \
  -params-file params.yaml
```

:::{.callout-note}
Replace `-profile docker` with `-profile podman` or `-profile singularity` depending on the desired backend.
:::

Running on Seqera or through Viash Hub is explained in the [guides](/guides/index.qmd).
